# EVE Online — overview window, dense tabular MMO UI

**Clawmachine-fit rating:** A

**Notes:** The permission to have a window with 200 rows + 20 columns. Column header vocabulary (range/angular/type/transversal) is pure operator bait.

**Credits / sources:** CCP Games, support.eveonline.com, forums.eveonline.com, r/Eve community.

**Use:** internal non-commercial fair-use design reference only. Do not redistribute.
